title: Echo Pharma and Helix Bio Share Long-Time Director Anna Schmidt
body: Swiss pharmaceuticals firm Echo Pharma Corp and German biotech Helix Bio share a long-time independent director, Anna Schmidt, according to filings reviewed by Reuters. Schmidt has served on Echo Pharma's board since 2014 and on Helix Bio's since 2017. Neither company has any known sanctions or compliance flags, and the relationship has been disclosed in proxy materials.
